title: Select from a variety of logged information, dependent upon an item on the connect boards column.
excerpt: Could we get a sort of mirror column that allows us to select from a variety of information already logged into the item found on the connect boards column?

posts.author: pedro.diaz (Pedro Diaz Jr.)
posts.cookedHtml: Could we get a sort of mirror column that allows us to select from a variety of information already logged into the item found on the connect boards column?
